creditCardDescription: Detects and redacts credit card numbers
ibanDescription: Detects and redacts international bank account numbers
ipAddressDescription: Detects and redacts IPv4 and IPv6 addresses
postProcessingDescription: Select which types of sensitive information should be automatically detected and redacted from model output after it is returned from the AI model. Using this feature turns off response streaming.
preProcessingDescription: Select which types of sensitive information should be automatically detected and redacted from user input before being sent to the AI model.
title: Guardrails
